name: CMLM-ZhongJing
desc: 首个中医大语言模型——“仲景”。受古代中医学巨匠张仲景深邃智慧启迪，专为传统中医领域打造的预训练大语言模型。 The first-ever Traditional Chinese Medicine large language model - "CMLM-ZhongJing". Inspired by the pro…
descFull: 首个中医大语言模型——“仲景”。受古代中医学巨匠张仲景深邃智慧启迪，专为传统中医领域打造的预训练大语言模型。  The first-ever Traditional Chinese Medicine large language model - "CMLM-ZhongJing". Inspired by the profound wisdom of the ancient Chinese medical master Zhang Zhongjing, it is a pre-trained large language model designed specifically for the field of Traditional Chinese Medicine.
